home.headline: Happy Together, Epic Forever
home.positioning_scope: BRAND EVENTS · PRESS · POP-UP · LARGE-SCALE PRODUCTIONS
home.positioning_value: For brands who want guests to remember the night.
home.cta_desc: Email, Line, phone or WhatsApp — I usually reply within two working days.

about.hero_h1_en: 把每一場活動做成一次性紀念品。
about.bio_paragraph: I'm Evan — an event planner, producer, and brand consultant based in Taipei. From pop-up experiences to large-scale outdoor events and corporate gatherings, every project I take on is built around one idea: the guest should walk away carrying a memory that belongs only to that night. Over the past few years I've worked with 50+ brands, following each project from concept through production to load-out — no hand-offs. If you're planning something you want people to remember, read on.
about.services_heading: What I can do for you.
about.service_brand_desc: From brief to concept — translating brand value into a reason worth showing up for. Theme ideation, flow design, art direction, guest experience choreography.
about.service_event_desc: Venue walk, vendor management, scheduling, day-of run show — handled end to end. Comfortable across large outdoor, indoor theater, and private venues.
about.service_corp_desc: Long-term retainer role, threading annual event strategy, external PR, and internal culture programs into one coherent brand experience line.
about.step_1_zh: 訪談 · 田野 · 目標拆解
about.step_1_desc: Figure out who you're actually talking to and what you want them to feel. Brand interviews, competitive scan, audience research. This phase stays slow on purpose — no assumptions.
about.step_2_zh: 概念 · 視覺 · 製作書
about.step_2_desc: From theme to flow to visual system to budget book — rehearse the whole event on paper first. Only move into production after all stakeholders align.
about.step_3_zh: 現場 · 收尾 · 檢討報告
about.step_3_desc: On-site from load-in to load-out, including risk control and real-time response. A data + retrospective report lands within a week after the event — so the next one starts stronger.
about.cta_desc: Email or IG DM — I usually reply within two working days.

contact.subheading: Pick whichever channel feels easiest — whatever works for you works for me.
contact.reply_note: Usually reply within two working days.
